# GoalOS Proof Gradient Arena v19

The Proof Gradient Arena is a browser-local demonstration of the GoalOS Selection Gate. It teaches the central rule: score is advisory, gates are mandatory.

A candidate can have an attractive advisory score and still be blocked if proof validity, evaluator pass, risk threshold, rollback readiness, canary readiness, scope authorization, or challenge clearance fails.

## User posture

- No accounts.
- No forms.
- No cookies.
- No analytics.
- No localStorage or sessionStorage.
- No wallet connection.
- No network request.
- No token route.
- No transaction broadcast.
- No production authority.
- No user data wanted.

## Objects demonstrated

- GoalOSCommit
- ProofPacket
- EvalAttestation
- SelectionCertificate
- RollbackReceipt
- Evidence Docket 6.1 public/private boundary

## Claim boundary

This page is a local public demonstration. It does not certify factual correctness, complete an external audit, promote production artifacts, authorize funds, route tokens, or broadcast Mainnet transactions.
